name: Rogz Dog Gumz Treat Ball 7.8cm - Blue Large
shortDescription: Rogz Gums Treat ball ? Blue Medium
description: Gumz dog ball is easy to bounce, easy to fetch, easy to carry and easy to love! And all dog parents know balls have always been a huge hit amongst dogs so upgrade that celebrated experience with a treat filled Gumz ball from Rogz. Playtime has never tasted this good! Benefits your dog's mental & physical health. Bone-shaped hole to fill with your dog's favorite treat. Easy to bounce & for your dog to fetch and carry. Durable exterior for the chewer in your home Size: Medium 7.8cm
